notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Trevor Story. Nick Fortes scores. Chandler Simpson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Trevor Story. Nick Fortes scores. Chandler Simpson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Trevor Story. Nick Fortes scores. Chandler Simpson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Chandler Simpson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Trevor Story. Nick Fortes scores. Chandler Simpson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Jonny DeLuca batting, Cedric Mullins picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Trevor Story.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Ben Williamson to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda grounds out, third baseman Caleb Durbin to first baseman Andruw Monasterio.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Andruw Monasterio. Jonny DeLuca out at 2nd. Nick Fortes out at 1st.
